overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a snowy medieval village at night. The character passes through a stone gate, traverses a camp area with tents and fires, and ascends wooden stairs along fortress walls. The scene features dramatic lighting from torches and campfires against the cold blue night.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone gate entrance to medieval fortress

events.description: exiting stone gate archway into open village square

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the stone gate entrance into the snowy village

entered.detail: large stone archway forming the entrance to the village
heavy wooden door frame and gate structure
rough stone fortress walls flanking the entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the stone gate entrance to a snowy medieval village at night. Geralt walks through the narrow stone passage, passing torch sconces on the walls, and emerges into the open village square. The transition from the enclosed gate to the open area reveals campfires and buildings in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open village square with military camp and bonfires

events.description: passing large burning campfire on the right side
slight turn to the right while approaching stairs

agents.ego_description: walking through the village center past tents and fire pits, surveying the area

entered.detail: large bonfire with flames illuminating the snow
large canvas tent with open front showing interior light
stone and wood medieval buildings with lit windows

segments.scene_description: Geralt moves through the open village square, passing military-style canvas tents and burning campfires that cast orange light on the snow. Stone buildings line the left side while wooden barricades appear on the right. The night sky is partially visible above the surrounding structures.

events.description: beginning ascent up wooden stairs along stone wall
reaching top of stairs and entering upper elevation walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs built into the stone hillside, moving upward through the fortress

entered.detail: steep wooden staircase with snow-covered steps
rough stone wall supporting the staircase
stacked wooden barrels beside the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep wooden staircase built against a stone retaining wall. Wooden barrels sit beside the path, and torchlight illuminates the snow-dusted steps. The village buildings fall away below as Geralt climbs toward the upper fortress level.

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper snow-covered path with fortress walls on the right

entered.detail: tall wooden defensive wall with battlements
multi-level stone watchtower with lit windows
buildings with snow-laden roofs visible below

segments.scene_description: Having reached the upper level, Geralt walks along a snow-covered path bordered by wooden fortification walls. A stone watchtower looms ahead in the distance, while snow-covered rooftops of the lower village are visible to the left. The elevated walkway provides a commanding view of the surrounding fortress.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a narrow stone gateway into the expansive, elevated fortifications of a snowy medieval village at night. It begins as Geralt passes through a confined stone passage lit by torch sconces, emerging from the enclosure into an open village square. As he moves forward, the scene expands to reveal military canvas tents and burning campfires that cast a warm orange glow across the snow-covered ground and surrounding stone buildings. The camera then follows the character as he ascends a steep wooden staircase, leaving the village square behind while climbing past snow-dusted steps and wooden barrels. Finally, the perspective shifts to an elevated walkway bordered by fortification walls, providing a commanding view of the lower rooftops and a distant stone watchtower under the dark night sky.
